utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Check if fully specified: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (type, address, price, size, bedrooms, features, reservation_reference, viewing_date) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (type, loan_amount, interest_rate, monthly_payment, down_payment, arrangement_fee, approval_timeline, reference) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (firm, package, cost, services, timeline, reference) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (type, cost, services, scheduled_date, route) — fully specified.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (type, cost, services, connection_date, plus surveys details) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property_price, down_payment, mortgage_arrangement, legal_services, surveys, moving_and_utilities, total_additional_costs, total_investment, monthly_mortgage_payment) — fully specified.
All items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: the property is 'Historic Townhouse' under purchase_properties; financing is 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage' under purchase_financing (named 'First-Time Buyer'); legal services select 'Premium Legal Package'; surveys include a 'Full Structural Survey' (called 'Full Structural Survey' in ratings) and a 'heritage_survey' which does not have a direct ground-truth item, so only the Full Structural Survey is mapped; moving services use 'Standard Moving Package' which matches 'Standard Moving'; utility setup uses 'Premium Utilities Setup' which matches 'Premium Utilities'. These items are mapped to their exact ratings.
